scripts.check:deploy: node --run check:syntax && node --test tests/map.test.js tests/passives.test.js tests/scoring.test.js tests/strain.test.js tests/encounter-coverage.test.js tests/encounter-presentation.test.js tests/simulation.test.js && node --test --test-name-pattern='Brewery|Labourers' tests/tile-placement.test.js
scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.mjs && find src tests -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
